evals.prompt: I just ran the astrodb-generate-schema skill and it wrote my schema to /tmp/BrownDwarfSurvey-schema.yaml — felis validate passed. Now I want to set up the actual database. Please create it for me in /tmp/bdsurvey-project/.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs felis validate on the schema, creates /tmp/bdsurvey-project/ with data/reference/ and data/source/ subdirectories, copies schema.yaml, creates database.toml, runs create_db.py to produce BrownDwarfSurvey.sqlite, runs generate_tests.py to create a tests/ directory with adapted test files (including test_contents_spectraltypes.py for the non-template SpectralTypes table), runs pytest to confirm all tests pass, and reports all file paths.

assertions.text: Creates BrownDwarfSurvey.sqlite in the project directory
Creates a tests/ directory with at least conftest.py and test_contents.py
Generates test_contents_spectraltypes.py for the non-template SpectralTypes table
Runs pytest and reports that all tests pass

evals.prompt: I have a Felis schema at /tmp/PhotometryCatalog-schema.yaml that I generated earlier. Can you initialize a new AstroDB database from it? Put everything in /tmp/photcat-db/.
evals.expected_output: The skill validates the schema, creates the astrodb-template-db directory structure under /tmp/photcat-db/ (data/reference/, data/source/, schema.yaml, database.toml), runs create_db.py to produce PhotometryCatalog.sqlite, runs generate_tests.py to create a tests/ directory, runs pytest to confirm all tests pass, and reports all file paths.

assertions.text: Creates PhotometryCatalog.sqlite in the project directory
Creates a tests/ directory with conftest.py referencing the correct db name
Runs pytest and reports passing results

evals.prompt: I have a schema.yaml sitting in /tmp/BrownDwarfSurvey-schema.yaml — I'm not sure if felis validate was run on it. Make the sqlite database at /tmp/bd-db-check/.
evals.expected_output: The skill explicitly runs felis validate on the schema before proceeding (because validation status is uncertain). If validation passes, it creates the full directory structure, database, and tests/ directory with all tests passing. It does NOT silently skip validation just because the user said they might not have done it.

assertions.text: Explicitly runs felis validate before creating the database
Creates a tests/ directory and runs pytest
